THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAGGERSTONE, JAIN PHILLIPS, AARON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3947 17TH STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL APR-01-2000, LEASE FORFEITED, DEFENDANTS SHALL DEPOSIT $750 ADDITIONAL SECURITY BY MAR 1, 2000, WHICH SHALL BE RETURNED IF THERE IS NO DAMAGE. IF NOT DEPOSITED, STAY MAY BE VACATED.
